calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Vacated

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Joint Motion For Paga Settlement Approval; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof ** Fee For Court Reporting Services Less Than 1 Hour Also Collected **
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Joint Motion For PAGA Settlement Approval.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The parties' unopposed joint motion for PAGA settlement approval is granted. The Court finds that the overall amount of the proposed settlement is fair and adequate in view of the purposes and policies of PAGA, taking into account such factors as the adequacy of the civil penalties in light of the potential maximum if the matter were to go to verdict and the risks of litigation. (Lab. Code 2699(l)(2).)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2021 Set For Trial On Jan-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
